name: Mandelbrot (Almond Bread)
recipeIngredient: Vegetable oil or vegetable oil spray
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat egg whites with eggs until creamy. Add the oil, vanilla extract, almond extract, and sugar, and stir ingredients to combine thoroughly. Stir in the almonds.
2. In a medium bowl, combine 3 cups flour with baking powder. Gradually stir this into the egg mixture. Continue adding flour, a little at a time, until the dough is fairly dry and easy to handle (consistency of modeling clay). The final additions are best kneaded by hand.
3. Preheat oven to 325°F. Knead the dough for 1-2 minutes, divide into 6 pieces, and roll each into a long, thin strip about 1 inch in diameter. Place the strips on greased cookie sheets. Brush or spray with vegetable oil, and sprinkle the strips with cinnamon-sugar.
4. Place the cookie sheets in the hot oven and bake the strips for 35 minutes.
5. Remove the strips from the sheets carefully, and slice the strips on the diagonal into cookies about 1/2 inch thick. Lay the cookies on their sides on the cookie sheets, and sprinkle the cookies again with cinnamon-sugar.
6. Return the cookies to the hot oven, and bake the cookies for an additional 10 minutes or until the cookies resemble hard toast.
Makes 72-96 cookies.
